sketches.mechanism: Ownership moves a non-Copy value into a function, so any later use of that binding is rejected at compile time.
sketches.resonance: What has truly been given away cannot be offered a second time.

sketches.mechanism: An inductive type with no constructors is uninhabited, and `nomatch` can eliminate an impossible value into any type.
sketches.resonance: Absence can answer everything only because it can never arrive to answer at all.

sketches.mechanism: Units of measure are tracked in the type system, so values with different dimensions cannot be added.
sketches.resonance: Some burdens cannot be summed merely because they both have weight in a life.
sketches.draft:
[<Measure>] type sorrow
[<Measure>] type days

let carried = 1<sorrow>
let counted = 1<days>
let total = carried + counted
